ogTitle: Durran Durra vs Durren Durren: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durran Durra and Durren Durren.
heading: Durran Durra vs Durren Durren — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durran Durra, New South Wales and Durren Durren, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durran Durra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Durren Durren (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durran Durra or Durren Durren safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durran Durra has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Durren Durren scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durran Durra scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Durren Durren scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durran Durra or Durren Durren?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durran Durra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
